definition: ICC profile-class and colorspace FOURCC tags at header offsets gate LUT pipeline construction operations (cmsPipelineAlloc, cmsPipelineCat stage-dup, MatrixElemDup Offset payload); VP gradient walks matching-prefix length on FOURCC comparisons while I2S substitutes the exact pipeline-routing class tags, with neither alone reaching the blocked pipeline operation.

authoring_contract.goal: ONE parameterized template.c isolating this cluster's shared mechanism, with exactly ONE compile-time -D knob = the program-feature axis. params.json:parameter MUST name that macro; scan_values sweep it; fuzzers = involved_fuzzers; expected_direction = '<winner> > <loser>'.
authoring_contract.isolate: No partial-match coverage edges unless the mechanism IS a gradient (VP families). Keep the gate the only objective.

signature.mechanism_summary: I2SRandReplace substitutes ICC magic/signature operands into the right header offsets, clearing upstream equality gates that gate construction of an offset-bearing matrix stage; VP cannot place those operands and the Offset pointer stays NULL.
signature.one_line: I2S clears header equality gates enabling non-NULL matrix stage Offset construction

analysis.summary_one_line: ICC profile parsed into a matrix stage carrying a non-NULL Offset vector, so MatrixElemDup duplicates the offset row.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: Bytes that survive ICC header signature/colour-space checks and place a non-zero offset payload so the matrix stage's Data->Offset pointer is non-NULL; W seeds carry the 'lams'/'link' profile class and non-zero bytes at offsets 0x2d (01) and 0x38 (16) where the loser holds zero.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: value_profile_cmplog seeds reach the true side: avg hitcount on branch winner=29, loser=0, and the byte diff shows winner-only 01 at 0x2d and 16 at 0x38 (loser is 00 at both), the dataflow that yields a populated Offset.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: value_profile never resolves (resolved=0/10, blocked=10); its seeds hold 00 at 0x2d and 0x38 and the 'lcms'/'mntr' header bytes, so the matrix stage is built without an Offset and the true branch is never taken.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: cmplog's I2SRandReplace reads the per-execution CmpLogObserver buffer and substitutes the matching ICC magic/signature operands into the input at the right offsets, letting value_profile_cmplog clear the header CMPs that gate construction of an offset-bearing matrix stage; value_profile lacks I2SRandReplace and cannot place those operands.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocker is the true side of `if (Data ->Offset)` in MatrixElemDup, taken only when the matrix stage carries a non-NULL Offset.
On the true side the winner-only lines duplicate the offset vector.
Winner-resolving seeds carry non-zero bytes at offsets 0x2d and 0x38 where the loser-blocking seeds are all zero.
Winner-only byte at offset 0x38 is 16 versus loser 00.
value_profile_cmplog hits the branch 29 times on average while value_profile never does.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: avg hitcount on branch: winner=29  loser=0

evidence_trail.claim: value_profile resolves the branch in 0 of 10 trials.
cmplog and value_profile_cmplog differ on the value_profile technique; winner hits 29 vs loser 13.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: avg hitcount on branch: winner=29  loser=13

evidence_trail.claim: cmplog blocks the branch in 8 of 10 trials.
I2SRandReplace substitutes one CMP operand into the input at offsets matching the other operand.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
scans the input for byte sequences matching one
operand, and substitutes the other operand at those offsets

evidence_trail.claim: value_profile uses a CMP_MAP distance bucket as gradient feedback and preserves inputs closer to matching.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
An input that produces a
CMP-operand pair closer to matching than any previously-seen pair
adds a new CMP_MAP bucket and is preserved as corpus.

evidence_trail.claim: cmplog header signature bytes differ from the winner's at offset 0x05.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness gating only `if (Offset)` behind an exact ICC signature CMP where value_profile_cmplog and value_profile resolve at equal rates would refute the I2S hypothesis; equal resolution between value_profile_cmplog and cmplog would refute the value_profile hypothesis.

analysis.weakest_evidence_point: The link from the non-zero bytes at 0x2d/0x38 to the runtime population of Data->Offset is inferred from the byte diff, not traced through the ICC matrix-stage parser source.

signature.mechanism_summary: VP's CMP_MAP records a Hamming/prefix-distance bucket per comparison and retains any input that brings a comparand pair closer to matching; this gradient on the ICC header/signature bytes drives vpc past the multi-field signature gates that cmplog's edge-bucket-only feedback cannot incrementally solve.
signature.one_line: VP Hamming gradient on ICC header CMPs drives past multi-field signature gates

analysis.summary_one_line: ICC profile parsed into a matrix stage carrying a non-NULL Offset vector, so MatrixElemDup duplicates the offset row.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: Same offset-bearing matrix-stage requirement, but reached by gradually closing the distance on the ICC header/signature comparisons rather than by exact substitution.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: value_profile_cmplog resolves 8/10 vs cmplog 2/10, with branch hitcount winner=29 vs loser=13; the CMP_MAP gradient buckets let it ratchet toward the signature/colour-space bytes (0x05, 0x0c-0x0f) that select an offset-bearing stage.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: cmplog blocks 8/10 and stays at hitcount 13 with avg blocked duration 20.20h; without CMP_MAP Hamming/prefix-distance feedback it has no gradient to preserve near-miss inputs and rarely assembles the offset payload.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: value_profile's CMP_MAP records a Hamming/prefix-distance bucket per CMP and preserves any input that gets a comparand pair closer to matching; this gradient feedback, present only in value_profile_cmplog within this pair, drives the winner past the header gates that cmplog (edge-bucket only) cannot incrementally solve.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocker is the true side of `if (Data ->Offset)` in MatrixElemDup, taken only when the matrix stage carries a non-NULL Offset.
On the true side the winner-only lines duplicate the offset vector.
Winner-resolving seeds carry non-zero bytes at offsets 0x2d and 0x38 where the loser-blocking seeds are all zero.
Winner-only byte at offset 0x38 is 16 versus loser 00.

evidence_trail.claim: cmplog header signature bytes differ from the winner's at offset 0x05.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness gating only `if (Offset)` behind an exact ICC signature CMP where value_profile_cmplog and value_profile resolve at equal rates would refute the I2S hypothesis; equal resolution between value_profile_cmplog and cmplog would refute the value_profile hypothesis.

analysis.weakest_evidence_point: The link from the non-zero bytes at 0x2d/0x38 to the runtime population of Data->Offset is inferred from the byte diff, not traced through the ICC matrix-stage parser source.

signature.mechanism_summary: I2SRandReplace substitutes logged CMP operands for the profile-class FOURCC check into the matching input offsets, producing a non-empty pipeline whose stages cmsPipelineCat attempts to dup, reaching the InsertStage true branch; VP without I2S never substitutes the alternate profile-class operands.
signature.one_line: I2S substitutes profile-class FOURCC enabling non-empty pipeline stage-dup insertion path

analysis.summary_one_line: A multi-profile ICC input whose profile-class/colorspace FOURCC fields build a non-empty Lut pipeline that cmsPipelineCat dups stage-by-stage.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: A valid 4-byte ICC profile-class FOURCC at offset 0x0c (e.g. 'link','prtr','spac','lcms') plus a recognized device/colorspace tag, so DefaultICCintents builds a non-empty Lut whose stages cmsPipelineCat then dups into l1 via cmsPipelineInsertStage.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: Winner-resolving seeds carry varied non-default profile-class signatures at 0x0c-0x0f ('lcms','link','prtr','spac','MCH1'), and the vpc winner's lineage contains an I2S-floor dash row that splices logged CMP operands into these FOURCC offsets, producing inputs that traverse the stage-dup loop and take the blocked true side.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: value_profile lacks I2SRandReplace; its loser-blocking seeds are uniformly 'mntr' at 0x0c-0x0f (6d 6e 74 72) and never substitute the alternate profile-class operands needed, so the pipeline stays in a shape that does not reach the InsertStage true branch (0/10 resolved).
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: value_profile_cmplog's I2SRandReplace reads the post-execution CmpLogObserver buffer and substitutes the logged comparand for the profile-class FOURCC check at the input offset, which value_profile (no I2S stage) cannot perform.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocker is the true side of an InsertStage check inside the per-stage dup loop of cmsPipelineCat.
The winner takes the loop/insert path while the blocked true side is the global blocker.
Winner seeds carry varied profile-class FOURCC fields at offsets 0x0c-0x0f distinct from the loser's uniform 'mntr'.
Loser-blocking seeds are uniformly 'mntr' at the profile-class offset.
Winner-resolving seeds carry alternate profile-class signatures such as 'link' and 'spac'.
value_profile_cmplog provides I2SRandReplace whereas value_profile does not.
I2SRandReplace substitutes a logged operand at the input offset where the other operand matched.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
scans the input for byte sequences matching one
operand, and substitutes the other operand at those offsets.

evidence_trail.claim: value_profile adds CMP_MAP distance-bucket feedback that rewards near-matching operands.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
An input that produces a
CMP-operand pair closer to matching than any previously-seen pair
adds a new CMP_MAP bucket and is preserved as corpus.

evidence_trail.claim: cmplog (the Pair 2 loser) has no CMP_MAP gradient feedback.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
same edge-bucket signal as naive. The CMP buffer is
consumed by the mutator, not by feedback.

evidence_trail.claim: vpc resolves the branch with far more hits than cmplog, showing accumulated progress.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: avg hitcount on branch: winner=50  loser=5

evidence_trail.claim: Pair 1 winner resolves 9/10 while the value_profile loser resolves 0/10.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness with the profile-class FOURCC field present but a fixed/zeroed stage list (so cmsPipelineCat's l2->Elements is always NULL) on which value_profile_cmplog and value_profile resolve at equal rates, showing the FOURCC substitution is not what gates the stage-dup branch.

analysis.weakest_evidence_point: The byte diff localizes the gating field to the 0x0c-0x0f profile-class FOURCC, but the actual CMP that I2S solves is inferred from source-region structure rather than observed CMP operand logs.

signature.mechanism_summary: VP's CMP_MAP Hamming/prefix-distance buckets reward inputs that bring the profile-class/colorspace FOURCC comparands closer to matching, retaining partial-match corpus entries that cmplog's edge-only feedback discards, enabling vpc to resolve the multi-field gate reliably.
signature.one_line: VP distance buckets reward partial FOURCC/colorspace progress cmplog discards

analysis.summary_one_line: A multi-profile ICC input whose profile-class/colorspace FOURCC fields build a non-empty Lut pipeline that cmsPipelineCat dups stage-by-stage.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: The same multi-profile FOURCC/colorspace fields, but reached via incremental Hamming-distance progress on the profile-class and colorspace CMP operands rather than a single exact substitution.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: value_profile_cmplog adds the CMP_MAP gradient on top of I2S, so partial matches on the 0x0c-0x16 tag bytes earn new CMP_MAP buckets and are retained as corpus, letting it resolve 9/10 with 50 hits versus cmplog's 5 hits.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: plain cmplog has no CMP_MAP feedback; without per-bucket distance credit it cannot accumulate the partial FOURCC/colorspace progress and resolves only 2/10 trials (loser blocked=8).
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: value_profile_cmplog's CMP_MAP gradient (Hamming/prefix-distance buckets) rewards inputs that bring the profile-class/colorspace comparands closer to matching, a feedback signal cmplog lacks.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocker is the true side of an InsertStage check inside the per-stage dup loop of cmsPipelineCat.
The winner takes the loop/insert path while the blocked true side is the global blocker.
Winner seeds carry varied profile-class FOURCC fields at offsets 0x0c-0x0f distinct from the loser's uniform 'mntr'.
Loser-blocking seeds are uniformly 'mntr' at the profile-class offset.
Winner-resolving seeds carry alternate profile-class signatures such as 'link' and 'spac'.
value_profile_cmplog provides I2SRandReplace whereas value_profile does not.
I2SRandReplace substitutes a logged operand at the input offset where the other operand matched.

scans the input for byte sequences matching one
operand, and substitutes the other operand at those offsets.

adds a new CMP_MAP bucket and is preserved as corpus.

evidence_trail.exact_quote:
same edge-bucket signal as naive. The CMP buffer is
consumed by the mutator, not by feedback.

evidence_trail.claim: vpc resolves the branch with far more hits than cmplog, showing accumulated progress.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: avg hitcount on branch: winner=50  loser=5

evidence_trail.claim: Pair 1 winner resolves 9/10 while the value_profile loser resolves 0/10.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness with the profile-class FOURCC field present but a fixed/zeroed stage list (so cmsPipelineCat's l2->Elements is always NULL) on which value_profile_cmplog and value_profile resolve at equal rates, showing the FOURCC substitution is not what gates the stage-dup branch.

analysis.weakest_evidence_point: The byte diff localizes the gating field to the 0x0c-0x0f profile-class FOURCC, but the actual CMP that I2S solves is inferred from source-region structure rather than observed CMP operand logs.

signature.mechanism_summary: I2SRandReplace substitutes logged FOURCC operands ('prtr' device-class, 'Lab ' colorspace) into the matching input signature offsets, steering execution to a cmsPipelineAlloc call where InputChannels reaches cmsMAXCHANNELS and the boundary check fires.
signature.one_line: I2S places 'prtr'/'Lab' FOURCCs to route to cmsMAXCHANNELS boundary check

analysis.summary_one_line: ICC profile whose class/colorspace FOURCC signatures route to a cmsPipelineAlloc call with InputChannels >= cmsMAXCHANNELS

hypotheses.what_input_feature: Exact 4-byte FOURCC profile-class and colorspace tokens at offsets 0x0c-0x16 (e.g. 'prtr', 'Lab ') that must equal hard-coded signature constants the parser compares against, steering execution to a cmsPipelineAlloc invocation whose InputChannels argument reaches cmsMAXCHANNELS so line 1373's true side is taken.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: The winning vpc seed carries 'prtr' at 0x0c-0x0f and 'Lab Lab ' at 0x10-0x17, and is the only seed that takes the true side (L1373 T=1 in the W role); its lineage contains an I2S-floor dash row, so I2SRandReplace spliced a logged CMP operand into these signature offsets.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: value_profile has no I2SRandReplace mutator; its blocking seeds keep the generic 'mntr'/'RGB '/'XYZ ' signatures at those offsets and never flip line 1373 to true (L1373 T=0 F=492 in the L role).
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: cmplog/vpc I2SRandReplace reads the post-execution CmpLogObserver buffer and substitutes the exact signature constant at the matching input offset, instantly satisfying the multi-byte FOURCC equality that value_profile (which lacks the mutator) cannot place by chance.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocker is the InputChannels>=cmsMAXCHANNELS comparison in cmsPipelineAlloc, globally blocked on its true side.
Only the winner role takes the true side of line 1373; the loser role never does.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: d=1   L1373  T=1 F=1  T=0 F=492  if (InputChannels >= cmsMAXCHANNELS ||  <-- BLOCKER

evidence_trail.claim: The winning seed carries the 'prtr' profile-class signature where losers carry 'mntr'.
The winning seed carries 'Lab ' colorspace signatures where losers carry 'RGB '/'XYZ '.
The loser value_profile seeds use the generic 'mntr' / 'RGB XYZ ' signatures.
cmplog/vpc add the I2SRandReplace mutator that substitutes one CMP operand into matching input offsets.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
scans the input for byte sequences matching one
operand, and substitutes the other operand at those offsets.

evidence_trail.claim: value_profile lacks I2SRandReplace entirely.
value_profile preserves inputs whose CMP operands move closer to matching via a distance bucket, including matching-prefix length for string/memory CMPs.
cmplog has the CMP buffer but no CMP_MAP gradient bucket feedback that value_profile adds.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
An input that produces a
CMP-operand pair closer to matching than any previously-seen pair
adds a new CMP_MAP bucket and is preserved as corpus.

evidence_trail.claim: The cmplog loser stays blocked much longer than the vpc winner.
vpc wins both decisive pairs, one isolating value_profile and one isolating I2S.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness whose only roadblock is the multi-byte FOURCC signature equality, where cmplog alone (I2S, no CMP_MAP) resolves the branch as fast as vpc — that would show I2S substitution suffices and the value_profile axis is not required, collapsing the multi_feature claim.

analysis.weakest_evidence_point: The CMP_MAP-gradient axis (Pair 1) is inferred from the loser's 24h block and the winner's concentrated FOURCC bytes rather than from a direct prefix-distance observation, so the value_profile contribution is the least directly evidenced claim.

signature.mechanism_summary: CMP_MAP prefix-length bucket feedback is the capability cmplog lacks; value_profile retains intermediate near-matches on FOURCC signature comparisons, providing a gradient that cmplog's CMP buffer alone cannot supply.
signature.one_line: VP CMP_MAP prefix-length bucket gradient is what cmplog lacks for FOURCC convergence

analysis.summary_one_line: ICC profile whose class/colorspace FOURCC signatures route to a cmsPipelineAlloc call with InputChannels >= cmsMAXCHANNELS

hypotheses.what_input_feature: The same FOURCC signature bytes at offsets 0x0c-0x16, but approached as a multi-byte comparison whose matching-prefix length must grow incrementally before the exact match is reached.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: The winner adds value_profile's CMP_MAP gradient on top of cmplog; the byte-diff shows the winner converged to a single concentrated value ('prtr','Lab ') at these offsets while losers retain a spread, consistent with a prefix-distance gradient retaining intermediate near-matches as corpus.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: cmplog has the edge+CMP buffer but no CMP_MAP bucket feedback, so it cannot retain partial-prefix progress on the signature comparisons; it stays blocked 10/10 with avg duration 24.00h versus the winner's 7.40h.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: value_profile's CMP_MAP records a matching-prefix-length bucket per string/memory CMP, preserving inputs that move closer to the target FOURCC; this gradient is the technique cmplog lacks, so the vpc>cmplog divergence is attributable to the CMP_MAP gradient axis.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocker is the InputChannels>=cmsMAXCHANNELS comparison in cmsPipelineAlloc, globally blocked on its true side.
Only the winner role takes the true side of line 1373; the loser role never does.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: d=1   L1373  T=1 F=1  T=0 F=492  if (InputChannels >= cmsMAXCHANNELS ||  <-- BLOCKER

evidence_trail.claim: The winning seed carries the 'prtr' profile-class signature where losers carry 'mntr'.
The winning seed carries 'Lab ' colorspace signatures where losers carry 'RGB '/'XYZ '.
The loser value_profile seeds use the generic 'mntr' / 'RGB XYZ ' signatures.

vpc wins both decisive pairs, one isolating value_profile and one isolating I2S.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness whose only roadblock is the multi-byte FOURCC signature equality, where cmplog alone (I2S, no CMP_MAP) resolves the branch as fast as vpc — that would show I2S substitution suffices and the value_profile axis is not required, collapsing the multi_feature claim.
